intro: Over a twelve-day period in April 2026, ZCyberNews published six articles on endpoint security, covering two high-severity vulnerabilities and two medium-severity issues, alongside two informational pieces. The most prominent vulnerabilities were CVE-2026-5490, carrying a CVSS score of 8.8, and CVE-2026-5492, with a CVSS score of 6.5. These security concerns primarily affected the education, government, healthcare, and utilities sectors, highlighting the broad risk landscape for organizations relying on endpoint defenses during this period.
